prompt:
Use case: photorealistic-natural
Asset type: website support section image
Primary request: calm editorial streetscape image for an About or areas-served section on a Nairobi-inspired real estate website
Scene/backdrop: upscale residential neighborhood with greenery, sidewalks or roadside planting, and believable local urban density
Subject: neighborhood atmosphere that suggests trust, livability, and premium service coverage
Style/medium: premium editorial environmental photography
Composition/framing: section-banner friendly wide crop with room for nearby UI content
Lighting/mood: soft warm daylight, calm and trustworthy
Color palette: warm stone, green foliage, charcoal, pale sky, muted earth tones
Materials/textures: paving, walls, planted edges, glass, textured facades
Constraints: no text, no logos, no signage focus, no watermark, no people, no tourist-landmark framing

Use case: photorealistic-natural
Asset type: website support section image
Primary request: refined editorial image for a real estate property-owner call-to-action section encouraging owners to list their property
Scene/backdrop: elegant residential tabletop or home entry context with subtle architectural cues nearby
Subject: a tasteful arrangement of house keys, tablet or clipboard, and real estate paperwork without readable text, designed to feel trustworthy rather than stock-corporate
Style/medium: premium editorial still-life photography
Composition/framing: section-banner friendly composition with clean negative space for UI and CTA copy
Lighting/mood: soft natural daylight, calm, professional, credible
Color palette: sand, cream, charcoal, olive accents, warm wood
Materials/textures: brushed metal keys, linen or paper texture, wood, stone, matte tablet surface
Constraints: no readable text, no logos, no watermark, no people, no cheesy sales staging, no unrealistic prop layout
